roa.docketEntryComment: ORDER REGARDING RESIDENTIALTREATMENT CONDITIONS AND GPS MONITOR FILED
DEFT MOTION FOR DEFT RELEASE ON OR OR BAIL REDUCTION FILED
/CAL:TRLG #18011720 & DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO REMOVE HOME DETENTION/MO GRTD/CTORD:THE HOME DETENTION & GPS BE TERMINATED/CONTD:PHC TRAILING #18011720IN DEPT, 23 & TRAILING #18011720 IN DEPT, 22/DOP/

/CAL:ACM REFERRAL/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BEPLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:FOR THE FIRST MONTH AT THE PROGRAM THE DEFENDANT IS NOT PERMITTED TO LEAVE THE FACILITY FOR ANY REASON EXCEPT UNDER THEDIRECTION AND SUPERVISION OF PERSONNEL FROM THE PROGRESS FOUNDATION/X:DEFENDANT TO ENTER DIRECTLY FROM CUSTODY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TOREPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR TRANSPORT ONLY TO GET THE GPS DEVICE INSTALLED AND THEN TO BE TRANSPORTED TO PROGRESS FOUNDATION- CORTLAND HOUSE AT 77 CORTLAND AVE, SF CA 94110/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU: NON PROGRAM COMPLIANCE/

/CAL:FURTHER PROCEEDINGS RE PETITION FOR MENTAL HEALTH DIVERSION/X:DEFENDANT IS FOUND INELIGIBLE FOR MENTAL HEALTH DIVERSION & THE APPLICATION IS DENIED,/CONTD:TO SET TRIAL ON 02-20-19 IN DEPT 22/JAIL PSY/
